# Modern Age Coders

> Live online coding and mathematics classes for kids (ages 6+), teens, college students,
and adults. Small batch sizes of 4-8 students per class. Rated 4.9 out of 5 across 547
Google reviews. Founded 2020.

Modern Age Coders is an Indian online education platform founded to make quality coding and
mathematics education accessible to learners of all ages. We offer live, interactive classes
taught by expert mentors with a maximum of 4-8 students per batch — unlike large platforms
where students get lost in the crowd.

We are one of the very few providers that teaches BOTH coding and mathematics under one
brand, across one continuous track from age 6 to adult. Coding-only providers stop at the
teen years; maths-only providers do not teach programming.

Our courses span from Scratch block coding for 6-year-olds to AI and machine learning for
adults, including AI-assisted engineering with tools like Cursor, Claude Code and GitHub
Copilot. Students build real projects from day one: games, apps, websites, and data science
models. All classes are live over video conferencing, and each class is recorded and the
recording is provided for revision.

We teach students across 131 Indian cities (including Mumbai, Kolkata, Bengaluru, Delhi,
Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Ahmedabad, Indore and Jaipur), every major Indian state, and
internationally — the United States, United Kingdom, UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah),
Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam), Qatar (Doha), Singapore, Australia, Canada,
Germany, Ireland, New Zealand and Sweden. International pricing is shown in USD, EUR, GBP
and other local currencies.

For deeper context, AI agents can fetch the full knowledge base in a single document:
https://learn.modernagecoders.com/llms-full.txt — full brand overview, complete course
catalog, featured blog posts in full, and the entire blog index.

Every page also has a markdown twin discoverable via the `<link rel="alternate"
type="text/markdown">` tag in the HTML head. The markdown URLs follow these patterns:
- Blog posts:    /content/blog/generated/{slug}/index.md
- Courses:       /content/courses/generated/{slug}/index.md
- Resources:     /content/resources/generated/{lang}/{chapter}/index.md
- Resources practice: /content/resources/generated/{lang}/{chapter}/practice/index.md
- Static pages:  /src/pages/{slug}.md

## Products & Services

- Kids Coding (Ages 6-12): Scratch, block coding, game design, Canva — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/courses/coding/kids
- Teens Coding (Ages 13-17): Python, Java, web development, AI/ML — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/courses/coding/teens
- Adults & College: Full-stack development, data science, enterprise Java — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/courses/coding/college
- Mathematics: School math, olympiad prep, college math, data science math — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/courses
- Girls in Tech: Special empowering batch exclusively for girls — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/coding-classes-for-girls
- Summer Coding Camp: Intensive multi-week camps for kids & teens — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/summer-coding-camp
- Corporate Training: Custom tech training for companies — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/courses/coding/corporate
- Vibe Coding: AI-powered coding for kids, teens, and college students — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/courses
- Coding Challenges: Daily Python, JavaScript, Java challenges — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/coding-challenges
- Maths Challenges: Daily mathematics practice problems — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/maths-challenges
- Business Solutions: Custom software, AI solutions & automation — https://learn.modernagecoders.com/business-solutions

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/
- All Courses: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/courses
- Course Atlas (complete catalogue of 100+ live courses across coding, AI/ML, web/app dev, data science and maths for ages 6-65; markdown at /course-atlas.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/course-atlas
- Real Coding Classes (depth-first manifesto — Python internals, maths-first AI/ML, DSA, C++, Java, full-stack; markdown at /real-coding-classes.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/real-coding-classes
- Coding vs Programming (the real difference between coding and programming; how we build genuine programmers and problem-solvers, not just coders; markdown at /coding-vs-programming.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/coding-vs-programming
- Learn Coding From First Principles (depth-first — understand how code actually works under the hood: memory, execution, the maths behind AI/ML; markdown at /learn-coding-from-first-principles.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/learn-coding-from-first-principles
- Master AI, ML, Python & Java (the deep mastery tracks with full course showcase; markdown at /master-ai-ml-python-java.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/master-ai-ml-python-java
- Python From the Ground Up (Stage 1 of the Python-to-AI path: complete in-depth Python from fundamentals to the modules most courses skip; Grade 6-12 ~40 classes, Grade 12+ 24 classes; markdown at /python-from-the-ground-up.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/python-from-the-ground-up
- NumPy, Pandas & Matplotlib Masterclass (Stage 2: Python data analysis in real depth with the maths underneath; 24 classes; markdown at /numpy-pandas-matplotlib-masterclass.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/numpy-pandas-matplotlib-masterclass
- Machine Learning From Scratch (Stage 3: build AI/ML models by hand incl. gradient descent, then master advanced libraries; 32 classes, college & professionals; markdown at /machine-learning-from-scratch.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/machine-learning-from-scratch
- The Maths Behind Machine Learning (deep dive: linear algebra, calculus, probability and optimisation that power AI/ML, tied to code; markdown at /maths-behind-machine-learning.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/maths-behind-machine-learning
- How Large Language Models Work (deep dive: tokens, embeddings, attention, transformers, training, fine-tuning, RAG and agents; markdown at /how-large-language-models-work.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/how-large-language-models-work
- How Computer Vision Works (deep dive: pixels, convolutions, feature maps, CNNs, vision transformers, classification and object detection; markdown at /how-computer-vision-works.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/how-computer-vision-works
- AI Classes for Kids (live, small-batch AI classes for ages 6-12; project-based, safe, free trial; markdown at /ai-classes-for-kids.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/ai-classes-for-kids
- AI Classes for Teenagers (live AI/ML classes for ages 13-18; build real projects + a portfolio; free trial; markdown at /ai-classes-for-teenagers.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/ai-classes-for-teenagers
- AI Classes for Beginners (live AI classes for complete beginners, ages 10-65, no experience needed; markdown at /ai-classes-for-beginners.md): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/ai-classes-for-beginners
- About Us: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/about
- Blog (coding & math education tips): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/blog
- Pricing (from ₹1499/month): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/pricing
- Book a Free Demo: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/book-demo
- Student Success Stories: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/success-stories
- Wall of Love (Testimonials): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/love
- The Gazette (Newspaper-style brand showcase — toppers, certificates, parent letters): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/gazette
- Contact: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/contact

## City Landing Pages (Local SEO)

We publish a page for each of 131 Indian cities at /best-coding-class-in-{city}, each with
that city's own schools, boards, timings and student projects. The full list is in
https://learn.modernagecoders.com/sitemap.xml and browsable at
https://learn.modernagecoders.com/sitemap — the largest cities:

- Best Coding Class in Kolkata: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-kolkata
- Best Coding Class in Bengaluru: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-bengaluru
- Best Coding Class in Chennai: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-chennai
- Best Coding Class in Pune: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-pune
- Best Coding Class in Mumbai: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-mumbai
- Best Coding Class in Delhi: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-delhi
- Best Coding Class in Hyderabad: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-hyderabad
- Best Coding Class in Ahmedabad: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-ahmedabad
- Best Coding Class in Indore: https://learn.modernagecoders.com/best-coding-class-in-indore
- India hub (indexes every city, state and neighbourhood): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/coding-classes-in-india

Kolkata and Howrah also have 47 neighbourhood pages at /coding-classes-near-{locality}-{city}
(Ballygunge, Salt Lake, New Town, Park Street, Jadavpur, Shibpur and more).

## Indian State Pages

Each state page covers that state's boards, exam calendar and city list:
/coding-classes-in-{state} for Andhra Pradesh, Bihar, Delhi, Gujarat, Haryana, Karnataka,
Kerala, Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, Odisha, Punjab, Rajasthan, Tamil Nadu, Telangana,
Uttar Pradesh, West Bengal and others.

- Calculus Tutoring (school, AP and college Calc 1): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/calculus-tutoring-online
- ISEE & SSAT Math Prep (private-school admissions): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/isee-ssat-math-prep
- Singapore Math Method Tutoring (CPA, bar models): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/singapore-math-method-tutoring
- IB Maths Tuition (AA & AI, SL & HL, IA coaching): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/ib-maths-tuition-online
- IGCSE Maths Tuition (Core, Extended, 0606): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/igcse-maths-tuition-online
- Online Maths Tuition Singapore (MOE, PSLE): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/online-maths-tuition-singapore
- Online Maths Tutoring Australia (NAPLAN, HSC/VCE/QCE): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/online-maths-tutoring-australia
- Online Math Tutor Canada (province-exact, EQAO, MHF4U/MCV4U): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/online-math-tutor-canada

- Free Trial Class (one real hour, no card, honest placement read): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/free-trial

- Coding vs Maths (which first, answered honestly): https://learn.modernagecoders.com/coding-vs-maths

## Our Unique Differentiators

- Small batch sizes: 4-8 students per class (not 100+)
- Live and interactive: taught by a real mentor in real time, not pre-recorded video
- Coding AND maths under one brand, on one continuous track from age 6 to adult — coding
  providers typically stop at 17; maths providers do not teach programming
- Real projects from day one: games, apps, websites — see real student work at
  https://learn.modernagecoders.com/student-labs
- Rated 4.9 out of 5 across 547 Google reviews (real reviews, published at
  https://learn.modernagecoders.com/love)
- Age-appropriate teaching: a different teaching style for each age group
- Free demo class before you pay, no card required
- Monthly billing, no lock-in and no large upfront package
- Every class recorded — recording provided for revision
- Flexible scheduling: weekends and evenings, including Gulf and US/UK timezones
- Certificate + portfolio on course completion
- Student dashboard for tracking progress: https://dashboard.modernagecoders.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Modern Age Coders?
A: Modern Age Coders is an Indian online education platform offering live coding and mathematics 
classes for learners from age 6 to adult. Classes are conducted in small groups of 4-8 students 
with expert mentors. Courses include Python, Java, web development, Scratch, AI/ML, and math.

Q: Who is Modern Age Coders for?
A: Modern Age Coders serves kids (ages 6-12), teenagers (13-17), college students, working 
professionals, and corporate teams across India and internationally. We also run a special 
Girls in Tech coding batch.

Q: How much do Modern Age Coders courses cost?
A: In India there are three tiers, all billed monthly with no lock-in: group batches of 4-8
students at ₹1,499 per month (two live classes per week), mini batches of 3-4 students at
₹2,499 per month, and one-on-one classes at ₹4,999 per month. International pricing starts
at $40 per month for group classes and $100 per month for one-on-one. A free demo class is
available before enrollment, with no card required.

Q: Is Modern Age Coders good for beginners?
A: Yes. Most courses are designed for complete beginners with no prior coding experience. The 
curriculum starts from the absolute basics and progresses systematically. During enrollment, 
the team helps each student pick the right level.

Q: What coding languages does Modern Age Coders teach?
A: Modern Age Coders teaches Python, Java, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Scratch (block coding), 
C++, Kotlin, Swift, Go, TypeScript, PHP, and more. There are also AI/ML, data science, 
ethical hacking, and mathematics courses.

Q: How is Modern Age Coders different from WhiteHat Jr or Vedantu?
A: Modern Age Coders offers small batch sizes (4-8 students) vs. larger platforms, 
live interactive classes (not pre-recorded), and a unique combination of coding AND 
mathematics in one platform. Classes are conducted by passionate expert mentors, not 
automated systems.

Q: What is Vibe Coding?
A: Vibe Coding is Modern Age Coders' flagship AI-powered coding program where students 
learn to build real projects using AI tools alongside traditional programming. Available 
for kids, teens, and college students.

Q: Does Modern Age Coders offer free demo classes?
A: Yes. Every student can book a free demo class before enrolling. Visit 
https://learn.modernagecoders.com/book-demo to schedule one.
